title: Annex A — Schedule of Unbilled Transfers
medium: six ComfyUI photograph plates (RealVisXL V5.0), each documenting a line item from §3 of the principal memorandum: the pan-coupé, the plinth-as-break-room, the ficus canopy, the newsstand face-out, the valet pedestal, the bolero station. Each plate carries a Non-Actionable stamp.
caption: A line item that only reaches the ledger as absence. Absence of interior; absence of invoice.
